title: Verifier v1 result schema (Research Governance v0.1, PR 15)
description: Output of `scripts/verify_candidate.sh --json <path>`. Records the deterministic verdict of one verification run.

candidate_id.description: Identifier from <candidate-dir>/manifest.toml::[candidate].id; falls back to the basename of <candidate-dir> when running without --candidate.

candidate_dir.description: Path of the candidate directory, or null when the verifier was invoked tree-level (no --candidate).

reasons.description: Empty for PASS_SHAPE_ONLY. One entry per failed/HRR check otherwise.

checks.description: Per-check sub-statuses. Keys are the check names; values are PASS/FAIL/HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED/SKIPPED/UNKNOWN. Absence of a key means the check did not run.

axioms_allowed.description: Allowed axioms for the closed final term, mirrored from spec/target.toml::[axioms].allowed at run time.

spec_version.description: Value of spec/target.toml::[meta].spec_version at run time.

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at end of the run. Optional; verify_candidate.sh emits it for human inspection but it is NOT part of the canonical hash for Rule 13 reproducibility.
